products.usage_frequency_vi: Là blend của BPC-157 và TB-500, Wolverine thường được nghiên cứu theo tần suất tương tự TB-500 - thường hai lần mỗi tuần trong giai đoạn đầu, sau đó một lần mỗi tuần - thường theo các đợt kéo dài nhiều tuần.
benefits_en: Combines BPC-157 and TB-500, two of the most-studied soft-tissue recovery peptides
Researched for supporting healing of tendons, ligaments, and muscle
Studied for promoting angiogenesis and cell migration to injury sites
Popular in sports-recovery and injury-rehabilitation research contexts
Offers the convenience of two complementary mechanisms in a single vial
benefits_vi: Kết hợp BPC-157 và TB-500, hai peptide phục hồi mô mềm được nghiên cứu nhiều nhất
Được nghiên cứu về hỗ trợ lành gân, dây chằng và cơ
Được nghiên cứu về thúc đẩy hình thành mạch máu và di chuyển tế bào đến vùng tổn thương
Phổ biến trong bối cảnh nghiên cứu phục hồi thể thao và phục hồi chấn thương
Mang lại sự tiện lợi khi kết hợp hai cơ chế bổ sung trong một lọ
products.tagline_en: BPC-157 + TB-500 stack. The classic injury-repair pair.
products.official_short_en: Pre-blended injury-recovery duo: BPC-157 5 mg + TB-500 5 mg in a single vial. The most-used research stack for tendon, ligament, and joint protocols.
products.official_long_en: Wolverine combines the two most studied repair peptides in a single convenient vial. BPC-157 handles microvascular formation and tendon-to-bone interface; TB-500 supports cell migration into the injury site. Together they are the canonical recovery pair.
products.mechanism_en: VEGFR2 upregulation + G-actin sequestration; stem-cell migration.
protocol_en: 0.2 mL subcutaneous near the area of interest, daily for 2–4 weeks.
Maintenance: 2–3× weekly. Rotate injection sites.
products.official_reconstitution_en: Add 2 mL bacteriostatic water to the blend vial.

bundles.name: Fat Loss Essentials
bundles.synergy_en: Maximum fat-loss protocol: appetite control (Retatrutide), direct fat breakdown (AOD9604), exercise-mimetic effects (SLU-PP-332), and visceral fat reduction (Tesamorelin).
bundles.synergy_vi: Phac do giam mo toi da: kiem soat them an (Retatrutide), dot mo truc tiep (AOD9604), gia lap tap the duc (SLU-PP-332) va giam mo noi tang (Tesamorelin).
bundles.tagline_en: Four-pillar metabolic stack for sustained fat loss.

bundles.name: Recovery & Healing Staples
bundles.synergy_en: The "Wolverine Stack": rapid recovery from muscle/bone/joint injuries (BPC-157 + TB-500) combined with complete tissue and skin regeneration (GHK-Cu).
bundles.synergy_vi: Con goi la "Wolverine Stack": phuc hoi chan thuong co/xuong/khop nhanh chong (BPC-157 + TB-500) ket hop tai tao mo va da hoan chinh (GHK-Cu).
bundles.tagline_en: Tissue, tendon, and ligament repair foundations.

bundles.name: Skin & Hair Growth Components
bundles.synergy_en: Full-spectrum rejuvenation: HGH and CJC-1295/Ipamorelin drive cellular turnover from within, while GHK-Cu rebuilds collagen, supports hair growth, and firms skin from the outside.
bundles.synergy_vi: Tre hoa toan dien: HGH va CJC-1295/Ipamorelin thuc day luan chuyen te bao tu ben trong, trong khi GHK-Cu tai tao collagen, ho tro moc toc va lam san chac da tu ben ngoai.

bundles.name: Longevity & Energy Collection
bundles.synergy_en: A longevity-focused stack: optimizes mitochondrial energy (MOTS-c, SS-31, NAD+) and supports DNA protection to help slow cellular-level aging (Epithalon).
bundles.synergy_vi: Goi huong toi keo dai tuoi tho: toi uu nang luong ty the (MOTS-c, SS-31, NAD+) va ho tro bao ve DNA, gop phan lam cham lao hoa o cap do te bao (Epithalon).

bundles.name: Neurological & Cognitive Necessities
bundles.synergy_en: A nootropic stack: helps reduce anxiety (Selank), supports focus and cognition (Semax), and supplies cellular energy to support brain function (NAD+).
bundles.synergy_vi: Goi nootropic: ho tro giam lo au (Selank), tang kha nang tap trung/nhan thuc (Semax), va cung cap nang luong te bao ho tro chuc nang nao bo (NAD+).

bundles.name: Muscle Building Stack
bundles.synergy_en: A lean-muscle stack aimed at maximizing an anabolic environment: HGH and the GH-stimulating duo CJC-1295/Ipamorelin paired with IGF-1 LR3, which is researched for supporting new muscle cell growth (hyperplasia).
bundles.synergy_vi: Goi tang co nac, huong toi toi da hoa moi truong dong hoa: HGH va bo doi kich thich GH (CJC-1295/Ipamorelin) ket hop IGF-1 LR3 - duoc nghien cuu ve kha nang ho tro tang sinh te bao co moi (hyperplasia).
bundles.tagline_en: GH-axis and anabolic recovery for hypertrophy research.

bundles.name: Libido Package
bundles.synergy_en: A libido-focused stack that approaches desire from two angles: the central nervous system (PT-141) and the hormonal/reproductive axis (Kisspeptin-10).
bundles.synergy_vi: Goi ho tro sinh ly, tiep can ham muon tu hai huong: he than kinh trung uong (PT-141) va truc noi tiet/sinh san (Kisspeptin-10).

bundles.name: Metabolic Reset Fundamentals
bundles.synergy_en: A metabolic-reset stack: supports weight management (Retatrutide), optimizes mitochondrial function (MOTS-c, SS-31), and supports physical endurance (SLU-PP-332).
bundles.synergy_vi: Goi tai khoi dong chuyen hoa: ho tro kiem soat can nang (Retatrutide), toi uu hoat dong ty the (MOTS-c, SS-31), va ho tro suc ben the chat (SLU-PP-332).

bundles.name: Immune System Batch
bundles.synergy_en: An immune-support stack: Thymosin Alpha-1 is researched for supporting immune defenses, BPC-157 for gut-lining balance (a major site of immune activity), and GHK-Cu for its anti-inflammatory, tissue-repair properties.
bundles.synergy_vi: Goi ho tro mien dich: Thymosin Alpha-1 duoc nghien cuu ve ho tro he mien dich, BPC-157 ho tro can bang nieu mac duong ruot (noi tap trung phan lon hoat dong mien dich), va GHK-Cu ho tro khang viem, phuc hoi mo.
bundles.tagline_en: Thymic, repair, and copper-peptide immune support.

steps_en: Gather supplies: the lyophilized (freeze-dried) peptide vial, a vial of Bacteriostatic Water, an appropriately sized syringe (e.g. an insulin syringe for small volumes), and a few alcohol swabs. Work on a clean, flat surface and wash your hands first.
Wipe the rubber stopper of the Bacteriostatic Water vial with an alcohol swab and let it air-dry for a few seconds before piercing it.

Draw the desired amount of Bacteriostatic Water into the syringe (the amount commonly used for each product's vial size is listed on that product's page). Remove any large air bubbles by tapping the syringe and pushing the plunger slightly.
Wipe the rubber stopper of the peptide vial with a fresh alcohol swab and let it air-dry.

Insert the needle into the peptide vial at an angle and slowly inject the Bacteriostatic Water down the INSIDE WALL of the vial rather than directly onto the powder. Injecting directly onto the powder or too quickly can cause excess foaming, which may denature (damage) the peptide.
Do not shake the vial. Instead, gently swirl the vial in a slow circular motion, or gently roll it between your palms, until the powder is fully dissolved.

If the solution is not fully clear after swirling, let the vial sit undisturbed at room temperature for a few minutes and then swirl again gently. Most peptides reconstitute into a clear, colorless-to-faint-tint solution (GHK-Cu based blends often show a light blue tint from the copper content, which is normal).
Once fully dissolved, label the vial with the reconstitution date (and, if helpful, the resulting concentration in mg/mL) so it is easy to track how long it has been mixed.
Store the reconstituted vial in the refrigerator (approximately 2-8°C) and keep it away from direct light, ideally in its original box or wrapped to block light exposure.

Try to use the reconstituted vial within the shelf life commonly cited for that specific peptide once mixed (often on the order of a few weeks when refrigerated) — check the product-specific guidance for that particular peptide rather than assuming one universal number, since stability varies by compound.
Avoid repeatedly freezing and thawing a reconstituted vial, and avoid leaving it at room temperature for extended periods, as both can accelerate degradation of the peptide.
steps_vi: Chuan bi day du: lo peptide dang bot dong kho, mot lo nuoc Bacteriostatic Water, mot ong tiem (bom kim tiem) co dung tich phu hop (vi du ong tiem insulin cho the tich nho), va vai mieng gac tam con. Lam viec tren be mat sach, phang va rua tay truoc khi bat dau.
Lau nap cao su cua lo nuoc Bacteriostatic Water bang gac tam con, de kho tu nhien vai giay truoc khi dam kim vao.

Rut luong nuoc Bacteriostatic Water can dung vao ong tiem (luong thuong dung cho tung loai san pham da duoc ghi trong trang chi tiet cua san pham do). Loai bot khong khi lon bang cach go nhe vao ong tiem va day piston mot chut.
Lau nap cao su cua lo peptide bang mieng gac tam con moi, de kho tu nhien.

Dam kim vao lo peptide theo goc nghieng va bom nuoc tu tu doc theo THANH TRONG cua lo, khong bom truc tiep len bot peptide. Bom truc tiep len bot hoac bom qua nhanh co the tao bot qua nhieu, lam hong (bien tinh) peptide.
Khong lac manh lo thuoc. Thay vao do, xoay nhe lo theo chuyen dong tron cham, hoac lan nhe lo giua hai long ban tay cho den khi bot tan het.

Neu dung dich chua trong hoan toan sau khi xoay, de lo yen o nhiet do phong vai phut roi xoay nhe lai. Da so peptide sau khi pha se cho dung dich trong, khong mau hoac hoi anh mau nhe (cac blend co GHK-Cu thuong co mau xanh nhat do thanh phan dong, day la binh thuong).
Sau khi bot da tan het, dan nhan len lo ghi ro ngay pha che (va neu can, ghi ca nong do mg/ml) de de dang theo doi thoi gian da pha.
Bao quan lo da pha trong tu lanh (khoang 2-8°C) va tranh anh sang truc tiep, tot nhat la de trong hop goc hoac boc lai de chan sang.

Nen su dung lo da pha trong khoang thoi gian thuong duoc khuyen nghi cho tung loai peptide cu the (thuong khoang vai tuan neu bao quan lanh) - hay tham khao huong dan rieng cua tung san pham thay vi ap dung mot con so chung cho tat ca, vi do on dinh khac nhau tuy hop chat.
Tranh dong lanh roi ra lanh lap di lap lai doi voi lo da pha, va tranh de lo o nhiet do phong qua lau, vi ca hai deu co the lam peptide xuong cap nhanh hon.
notes_en: Always use Bacteriostatic Water (not plain sterile water) when possible, since its antimicrobial preservative helps the reconstituted solution stay usable longer.
Use a new needle/syringe for each vial you access to reduce contamination risk, and never reuse a syringe that has already been used for injection to draw from a shared vial.
If a reconstituted solution appears cloudy, discolored beyond what is expected, or has visible particles, it is generally best not to use it.
This guide describes general, commonly published industry practice for handling research peptides and is not medical or dosing advice.

When reconstituted with Bacteriostatic Water, many peptide vendors commonly cite a shelf life of up to about 28 days (4 weeks) refrigerated, though this can vary by specific peptide -- check that product's own guidance when available.
notes_vi: Luon uu tien dung nuoc Bacteriostatic Water (khong dung nuoc cat thuong) neu co the, vi chat bao quan khang khuan trong do giup dung dich sau khi pha su dung duoc lau hon.
Dung kim/ong tiem moi moi khi thao tac voi tung lo de giam nguy co nhiem khuan, va khong bao gio dung lai ong tiem da tiem de rut thuoc tu lo dung chung.
Neu dung dich sau khi pha bi duc, doi mau bat thuong, hoac co can/hat la, thi tot nhat khong nen su dung.
Huong dan nay mo ta thuc hanh chung, pho bien trong nganh doi voi peptide nghien cuu, khong phai loi khuyen y te hay huong dan lieu dung.

Khi pha voi nuoc Bacteriostatic Water, nhieu nha cung cap peptide thuong de cap thoi han su dung khoang 28 ngay (4 tuan) neu bao quan lanh, tuy nhien con so nay co the khac nhau tuy loai peptide - nen kiem tra huong dan rieng cua tung san pham neu co.
guide.safety_note_en: These products are intended for adult research use only (18+) and are not intended for use by minors, or by pregnant or nursing women. Anyone with an existing medical condition or who is taking medication should consult a qualified healthcare professional before considering use of any peptide. These items are sold for research purposes and, with limited exceptions, have not been evaluated or approved by regulatory agencies as drugs for general public use; Tirzepatide and Retatrutide are exceptions in that their active molecules have separate FDA-approved pharmaceutical formulations (e.g. Mounjaro/Zepbound, and Retatrutide's ongoing pharma development) marketed under different branding for specific medical indications, which is distinct from the research-grade product listed here.
guide.safety_note_vi: Cac san pham nay chi danh cho muc dich nghien cuu o nguoi truong thanh (tu 18 tuoi tro len), khong danh cho tre vi thanh nien, phu nu co thai hoac dang cho con bu. Nguoi co benh ly nen hoac dang dung thuoc dieu tri nen tham khao y kien chuyen gia y te truoc khi can nhac su dung bat ky loai peptide nao. Cac san pham nay duoc ban cho muc dich nghien cuu va, tru mot so ngoai le, chua duoc cac co quan quan ly danh gia hay phe duyet nhu thuoc dung cho cong chung noi chung; Tirzepatide va Retatrutide la ngoai le vi hoat chat cua chung co cac dang bao che duoc pham rieng da duoc FDA phe duyet (vi du Mounjaro/Zepbound, va Retatrutide dang trong qua trinh phat trien duoc pham) ban duoi thuong hieu khac cho cac chi dinh y te cu the, khac voi san pham nghien cuu duoc liet ke tai day.
guide.cycling_note_en: Cycling needs vary a lot by peptide class, and there is no single official per-year limit that applies to all products -- check each product's own 'cycling' info first when available, and only fall back to these general patterns otherwise. GH-secretagogues (CJC-1295/Ipamorelin, Sermorelin, HGH, Tesamorelin) are commonly cycled about 8-12 weeks on, then about 4 weeks off, since continuous stimulation is commonly linked to reduced pituitary/receptor responsiveness (tachyphylaxis) over time. GLP-1/GIP-receptor agonists (Retatrutide, Tirzepatide) generally do NOT require on/off cycling and are commonly used continuously with dose titration, since they do not cause the same receptor desensitization. Recovery peptides (BPC-157, TB-500) are typically run 4-8 weeks (up to 12-16 weeks for blends), resting at least as long as the completed cycle, allowing roughly 2-3 full cycles per year. GHK-Cu is commonly cycled in shorter blocks such as 30 days on/14 days off (several cycles per year), partly to limit cumulative copper exposure. Very short-course peptides like Epithalon (about 10 nightly doses) are followed by an extended break of several months, often cited as up to about 3 short courses per year. Thymosin Alpha-1 is commonly run in 5-8 week cycles about 2-3 times per year, or as shorter maintenance courses during specific higher-risk periods. These are patterns commonly described in peptide-community and vendor literature, not a single official regulatory limit -- present them as general starting points, not a fixed rule for a specific individual, and say so plainly for any compound not covered by this note or its own product-specific cycling info.
guide.cycling_note_vi: Nhu cau chia chu ky khac nhau nhieu tuy nhom peptide, va khong co con so gioi han chinh thuc theo nam ap dung chung cho tat ca san pham -- uu tien xem thong tin 'cycling' rieng cua tung san pham truoc, chi dung cac mau hinh chung duoi day khi khong co thong tin rieng. Nhom kich GH (CJC-1295/Ipamorelin, Sermorelin, HGH, Tesamorelin) thuong dung chu ky khoang 8-12 tuan roi nghi khoang 4 tuan, vi kich thich lien tuc thuong duoc cho la lam giam do nhay tuyen yen/thu the theo thoi gian (tachyphylaxis). Nhom chu van thu the GLP-1/GIP (Retatrutide, Tirzepatide) thuong KHONG can chu ky nghi va thuong duoc dung lien tuc co tang lieu dan, vi khong gay giam nhay thu the tuong tu. Peptide phuc hoi (BPC-157, TB-500) thuong dung 4-8 tuan (toi 12-16 tuan voi dang blend), nghi it nhat bang thoi gian chu ky vua dung, cho phep khoang 2-3 chu ky day du moi nam. GHK-Cu thuong dung chu ky ngan hon nhu 30 ngay dung/14 ngay nghi (nhieu chu ky hon moi nam), mot phan de han che tich luy dong. Cac peptide dung dot rat ngan nhu Epithalon (khoang 10 dem lien tiep) duoc theo sau boi mot khoang nghi dai vai thang, thuong duoc de cap toi da khoang 3 dot ngan moi nam. Thymosin Alpha-1 thuong dung chu ky 5-8 tuan khoang 2-3 lan/nam, hoac theo dot bao tri ngan hon vao cac giai doan nguy co cao hon. Day la cac mau hinh thuong duoc mo ta trong cong dong peptide va tai lieu nha cung cap, khong phai mot gioi han quy dinh chinh thuc duy nhat -- trinh bay nhu diem khoi dau chung, khong phai quy tac co dinh cho mot ca nhan cu the, va noi ro neu mot hop chat khong nam trong ghi chu nay hay khong co thong tin cycling rieng.

mixing_guide.title_en: Can Different Peptides Be Mixed Together?
mixing_guide.title_vi: Co The Tron Chung Cac Peptide Voi Nhau Khong?
mixing_guide.general_rule_en: Always reconstitute each peptide in its OWN vial with its own Bacteriostatic Water -- never add water to more than one peptide's powder in the same vial. 'Mixing peptides' normally refers to drawing doses from two or more already-reconstituted vials into the same syringe immediately before injecting, not combining them during reconstitution.
mixing_guide.general_rule_vi: Luon pha tung loai peptide trong LO RIENG cua no voi nuoc Bacteriostatic Water rieng -- khong bao gio bom nuoc vao chung bot cua hai peptide khac nhau trong cung 1 lo. 'Tron peptide' thuong co nghia la rut lieu tu hai hay nhieu lo da pha san vao chung 1 ong tiem ngay truoc khi tiem, chu khong phai tron luc pha che.
notes_en: Two reconstituted peptides are generally considered fine to draw into the same syringe when both are water-soluble, reconstituted in plain Bacteriostatic Water, and stable around a similar near-neutral pH (roughly 6-7) -- this is why combos like BPC-157 + TB-500, or CJC-1295 + Ipamorelin, are commonly drawn together or even sold as a single pre-mixed blend vial.

Avoid combining peptides whose solutions sit at very different pH extremes (very acidic, below ~4, mixed with very alkaline, above ~8), since forcing them together can push both out of their stable range and reduce potency.

GHK-Cu is a special case: it carries a copper ion, which acts as an oxidation catalyst. Combining GHK-Cu with peptides that contain oxidation-sensitive amino acids (e.g. methionine, cysteine, tryptophan) in the same syringe can accelerate degradation of the other peptide. The general recommendation is to inject GHK-Cu separately from other peptides rather than combining it in one syringe, even if both are used in the same overall protocol (e.g. GHK-Cu and NAD+ are commonly run in the same protocol, just as separate injections, not mixed together).

When in doubt about a specific pair not covered here, the safer default is to inject them separately rather than combine them, since combining is about convenience, not a requirement -- separate injections are never wrong.
This is general, commonly published compatibility guidance, not a lab-verified compatibility test for every possible pair -- it is not medical advice.
notes_vi: Hai peptide da pha thuong duoc coi la on khi rut chung vao 1 ong tiem neu ca hai deu tan trong nuoc, pha bang nuoc Bacteriostatic Water thong thuong, va on dinh o muc pH gan trung tinh tuong tu nhau (khoang 6-7) -- day la ly do cac cap nhu BPC-157 + TB-500, hay CJC-1295 + Ipamorelin, thuong duoc rut chung hoac tham chi duoc ban san duoi dang 1 lo blend da tron san.
Tranh ket hop cac peptide co dung dich o hai thai cuc pH qua khac nhau (rat axit, duoi ~4, tron voi rat kiem, tren ~8), vi ep chung lai co the day ca hai ra khoi vung on dinh va lam giam hieu luc.

GHK-Cu la truong hop dac biet: no mang ion dong, co tac dung nhu chat xuc tac oxy hoa. Ket hop GHK-Cu voi cac peptide co chua axit amin nhay cam voi oxy hoa (vi du methionine, cysteine, tryptophan) trong cung 1 ong tiem co the day nhanh su phan huy cua peptide kia. Khuyen nghi chung la tiem GHK-Cu rieng, khong tron chung ong tiem voi peptide khac, du ca hai van co the dung chung trong 1 phac do (vi du GHK-Cu va NAD+ thuong duoc dung chung phac do, nhung tiem rieng, khong tron chung).
Neu khong chac ve 1 cap cu the chua duoc de cap o day, lua chon an toan hon la tiem rieng thay vi tron chung, vi tron chi la de tien loi chu khong bat buoc -- tiem rieng khong bao gio sai.
Day la huong dan tuong thich chung, pho bien duoc cong bo, khong phai ket qua kiem nghiem phong lab cho tung cap cu the -- khong phai loi khuyen y te.

video_insights.summary:
- Lieu luong duy tri suc khoe va ho tro truong tho: Su dung 500 mcg tu 1 den 2 lan moi ngay.

- Lieu luong ho tro phuc hoi chan thuong: Dung 2 den 5 mg moi ngay trong 5 den 10 ngay dau, sau do giam xuong 1 mg moi ngay trong 10 den 15 ngay tiep theo, truoc khi quay lai lieu duy tri 500 mcg chia lam 2 lan moi ngay.

- Hieu qua cua duong uong: BPC-157 duong uong duoc nhan xet la khong co hieu qua thuc te.

- Canh bao ve chat luong va pha che: Cac trai nghiem tieu cuc khi dung BPC-157 thuong do mua phai san pham kem chat luong (chi chua chat don mannitol) hoac do pha che sai cach voi axit axetic.

- Giai thich ve tinh an toan va ung thu: BPC-157 khong tu gay ra ung thu vi ung thu la do su suy giam co che tu huy cua te bao loi va loi kiem soat phan bao, chu khong don thuan la do cac tin hieu tang truong.
